LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT MICHAEL TAYLOR DESIGNS, INCORPORATED'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED; THERE IS A TRIABLE ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACT WHETHER PLAINTIFF AGREED TO ALLOW DEFENDANT TO DEFER RENT. Off Calendar Oct-28-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
DEFENDANT MICHAEL TAYLOR DESIGNS, INCORPORATED'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED; THERE IS A TRIABLE ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACT WHETHER PLAINTIFF AGREED TO ALLOW DEFENDANT TO DEFER RENT. Prevailing party is to submit a proposed form of order pursuant to
CCP 437 C(g). Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen CSR # 8189 =301/PJB
